questions.question: Describe the criteria for determining whether two processes are in a deadlock. Provide an example to illustrate each condition.
questions.hint: List the three conditions for a deadlock

questions.question: Explain the Banker's Algorithm and its application in resolving deadlocks. How does it work?

questions.hint: Compare and contrast deadlocks and livelocks
